name: C-7 emitted bundle declares bomFormat CycloneDX and specVersion 1.6 per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.0.0 --emit a.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("a.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.bomFormat==="CycloneDX"&&j.specVersion==="1.6"?0:1)' && echo cyclonedx 1>&2
